texto: Some people's lives seem to flow in a narrative
autor: mine had many stops and starts. That's what trauma does. It interrupts the plot. You can't process it because it doesn't fit with what came before or what comes afterwards.
explicacao: Citação de mine had many stops and starts. That's what trauma does. It interrupts the plot. You can't process it because it doesn't fit with what came before or what comes afterwards. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Some people's lives seem to flow in a narrative” articula reflexao, jessica-stern, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
